description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Heel: 3.25"Product DetailsLight brown upper with a beaded toe holder and midfoot strapSoft, padded footbed with a heel patchWedge styling in brownTPR outsole with grooves at the forefoot Material and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
